title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Ghaziabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises:
Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr Lal PathLabs International Enterprises!
